description:
Seven modules under livespec_runtime/cross_repo/ carry 'Per livespec/SPECIFICATION/contracts.md v072 §...' in their module docstrings, but .livespec.jsonc's livespec-runtime.compat.pinned is currently 'master' (the post-v072 bootstrap pin). Drop the version pin from each docstring OR replace with the actual current pin once livespec's first post-v072 release tag lands. The .livespec.jsonc compat.pinned field is the authoritative pin location; the docstring pins are descriptive and stale.

Affected files (7 occurrences):
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/__init__.py
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/errors.py
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/providers/__init__.py
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/providers/github.py
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/resolve.py
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/retry.py
- livespec_runtime/cross_repo/types.py

When this lands, also replace 'exhaustive live-walk' in livespec_runtime/cross_repo/resolve.py's module docstring with 'per-variant live-walk' to align with the v003 spec rename in SPECIFICATION/history/v003/spec.md.

Origin: livespec-runtime SPECIFICATION/history/v003/proposed_changes/doctor-findings-bundle-second-pass.md §'Impl-side follow-ups (filed as work-items, not spec changes)' → 'Work-item: refresh-impl-docstring-version-pins'.
title: refresh-impl-docstring-version-pins

description:
livespec_runtime/cross_repo/providers/github.py:96-99 currently detects branch-absent via `'404' in exc.stderr` — a substring match on stderr text. Any unrelated stderr fragment containing '404' (an HTTP 404-redirect mention in an error body, etc.) would mis-categorize a present-but-failing query as a deleted branch and collapse the resolve_ref result to RefStatus.CLOSED instead of degrading to RefStatus.UNKNOWN.

Replace the substring probe with one of:
1. Inspect exc.returncode + parse gh's stderr line-by-line    for the structured 'HTTP 404' prefix.
2. Use 'gh api --silent' with an explicit --jq query that    returns a stable success/failure shape; branch on the    parsed output.

The spec edit in SPECIFICATION/history/v003/contracts.md §'livespec_runtime.cross_repo.providers.github' / 'branch_exists_on_remote' documented the detection mechanism and the harden-via-exit-code directive; this work-item carries the corresponding code change.

Origin: livespec-runtime SPECIFICATION/history/v003/proposed_changes/doctor-findings-bundle-second-pass.md §'Impl-side follow-ups' → 'Work-item: harden-branch-exists-404-detection'.
reason: Fixed in PR #15 — replaced '404' substring probe with structured '(HTTP 404)' marker scan; regression test added.
title: harden-branch-exists-404-detection
